info.name: The Cluckinator + Fries
info.description: Meal for one. Our signature The Cluckinator burger along with a portion of crispy golden fries.

info.name: Non Veg Combo For 2 - Cluckinator + Saucy Clucker + Fries
info.description: Meal for two. Our signature chicken burgers, The Cluckinator and The Saucy Clucker along with a side of crispy golden fries.

info.name: Veg Combo For 2 - Cheesebomb + Couch Potahto + Peri Fries
info.description: Meal for two. Our favourite veg burgers, The Cheese Bomb and Couch Potahto, along with a side of crispy peri fries.

info.name: 2 Burger Combo (nv) - Grilla + Cluckin' Standard
info.description: 2 grilled chicken burgers to swap and share.

info.name: 2 Burger Combo (veg) - Pioneer + Hot Potahto
info.description: 2 bestselling veg burgers to swap and share.

info.name: The Cluckinator + Atomic Tenders
info.description: The Spice Pack. Our two best sellers The Cluckinator burger and Atomic Tenders.

info.name: The Cheese Bomb + Peri Fries
info.description: Meal for one. Our signature The Cheese Bomb burger along with a portion of crispy peri fries.

info.name: Potahto BFF Meal (burger + Fries + Flippinade)
info.description: 1 Veg burger, Fries, choice of Flippinade

info.name: Chicken BFF Meal (burger + Fries + Flippinade)
info.description: 1 Chicken burger, Fries, choice of Flippinade

info.name: The Cluckinator
info.description: Spicy Buttermilk Fried Chicken Breast deep fried till golden and crispy, served with our Spicy Honey Mustard Sauce and Lettuce on a freshly Baked Bun. Kcals: 667.81

info.name: The Grilla
info.description: Juicy Grilled Chicken Breast marinated in our Peri Peri Spice Rub on a bed of Fresh Lettuce, Tomatoes and Onions with creamy Jalapeno Cheese Sauce on our freshly Baked Buns.  Kcals: 523.48

info.name: The Saucy Clucker
info.description: Our Saucy, Sweet & Spicy Clucker made of Crispy Fried Chicken Breast Coated in our inhouse Smoky BBQ Sauce served with Lettuce and Spicy Bhoot Sauce on a freshly baked bun.  Kcals: 656.43

info.name: The Classy Clucker
info.description: Southern Fried Chicken Breast deep fried till Golden and Crispy served with Chipotle Mayo, Gherkins and Lettuce on a freshly Baked Bun. Serving Size - Kcal 663.05

info.name: Cluckin' Standard
info.description: A perfectly grilled chicken patty, layered with a creamy cheese sauce and onions nestled in a freshly baked bun. Kcals: 600.94

info.name: Double Standard
info.description: Perfectly grilled double chicken patties, layered with a creamy cheese sauce and onions nestled in a freshly baked bun. Kcals: 862

info.name: Peri Single Clucker
info.description: A perfectly grilled, peri spiced, chicken patty, layered with onions and a spicy garlic aioli nestled in a freshly baked bun. Kcals: 576.09

info.name: Peri Mother Clucker
info.description: Peri spiced, perfectly grilled double minced chicken patties, layered with onions and a spicy garlic aioli nestled in a freshly baked bun. Kcals: 838

info.name: The Kerfuffle
info.description: TWO Juicy Buffalo Patties & TWO Cheddar Cheese slices, layered with Truffle Mayo and Lettuce on a freshly Baked Brioche Bun. Juicy, Simple & Delicious.  Kcals: 740.5

info.name: The OG Smash
info.description: Two beautifully caramelized smashed Buffalo patties topped with cheddar cheese layered with our signature GOOD sauce and grilled onions in a soft brioche bun. CLASSIC !!  Kcals: 713.1

info.name: The Hot Smash
info.description: Two beautifully caramelized smashed Buffalo patties topped with cheddar cheese layered with our hot garlic aioli, grilled onions and topped with Jalapenos in a soft brioche bun.  Kcals: 643.63

info.name: Couch Potahto
info.description: Cajun-spiced potato patty topped with creamy cheese sauce and fresh onions. Kcals: 772.64

info.name: Hot Potahto
info.description: Crispy, peri-peri spiced potato patty, spicy garlic aioli sauce, fresh onions, and fiery jalape

info.name: The Cheese Bomb
info.description: The Crispiest Cheesiest Patty that we could dream of in a burger with the Good Sauce, Herbed Cheese seasoning, Tomatoes, Onions and Lettuce on a freshly Baked Bun. Kcals: 696.75

info.name: Veggie Seagal
info.description: [Vegetarian Preparation] Crispy Potato Patty loaded with Beets, Broccoli and Corn with Spicy Barbecue served with fresh Onions, Gherkins and Lettuce on a freshly baked bun.

info.name: The Habibi Burger
info.description: A Crispy Falafel Patty topped with a Creamy Beet Hummus served with Lettuce and fresh onions on a freshly baked bun. Kcals: 636.28

info.name: Sir Truffalot
info.description: Umami packed Shiitake Mushroom patty layered with our signature Truffle aioli topped with cheddar cheese served with lettuce and fresh onions on a freshly baked soft Brioche Bun. Kcals: 719.5

info.name: The Pioneer
info.description: A crispy, spiced paneer patty, layered with our spicy garlic mayo, lettuce and onions, served in a freshly baked, soft brioche bun. Kcals: 768.18

info.name: Falafel Crunch Wrap
info.description: Flavour packed falafel filling, fresh lettuce and onions layered with our garlic aioli wrapped in a grilled tortilla.  Kcals: 604.74

info.name: Truffle Shroom Wrap
info.description: Shiitake mushroom with umami, our signature truffle aioli, creamy cheddar cheese, lettuce, and onions in a grilled tortilla wrap. Kcals: 732.33

info.name: BBQ Paneer Wrap
info.description: Crispy Fried Perfectly Seasoned, Creamy Paneer Patty, Encased In A Tortilla Wrap With Fresh Onion Rings, Lettuce And Our Signature Smoky Bbq Sauce. Kcals: 671

info.name: The Proteinator Wrap
info.description: Grilled chicken breast, fresh lettuce and onions layered with a creamy ranch sauce wrapped in a grilled almond tortilla.  Energy: 448.66 Kcal | Protein: 31.2 g | Carbohydrates: 28.94 g | Fat: 22.22 g | Fibre: 4.06 g

info.name: Atomic Chicken Wrap
info.description: Signature Crispy Spicy chicken, fresh lettuce and inhouse honey mustard wrapped in a grilled tortilla.  Kcals:  498.87

info.name: Grill Chick 'n Cheese Wrap
info.description: Grilled chicken breast, fresh lettuce and onions layered with a creamy cheese sauce wrapped in a grilled tortilla. Kcals: 489.13

info.name: Phat Dog
info.description: Grilled Chicken Sausage tucked in the softest Hot Dog Bun with Jalapeno cheese sauce, Mustard and Smoky BBQ sauce.  Kcals: 470.6

info.name: Atomic Dog
info.description: Our signature spicy Atomic Tender tucked in the softest hot dog bun with Jalapeno Cheese sauce & Smoky Bbq Sauce.  Kcals: 496.66

info.name: Fries
info.description: Classic, Crispy & Golden Skin on Fries, Lightly Salted And Served With Our In-House Fry Sauce. (Kcals: 394.45 excluding dip)

info.name: Peri Fries
info.description: Crispy Thick Cut Fries Sprinkled With Our Peri Peri Powder Served With Our Signature Fry Sauce. (Kcals: 390.79 excluding dip)

info.name: Cheesy Fries
info.description: Golden Thick Cut Fries sprinkled with a herbed cheese seasoning served with a Jalapeno Cheese Sauce.  (Kcals: 425.66 excluding dip)

info.name: Potato Wedges
info.description: Crispy, Herb Crusted Potato Wedges are served with our Fry Sauce.  (Kcals: 364.14 excluding dip)

info.name: Peri Peri Wedges
info.description: Crispy, Herb Crusted Potato Wedges Sprinkled with our Peri Peri Seasoning served with our Fry Sauce. (Kcals: 428.73 excluding dip)

info.name: Crispers
info.description: Crispy, skin-on, crinkle cut potatoes, lightly salted and served with our Fry Sauce.  (Kcals: 546.72 excluding dip)

info.name: Peri Crispers
info.description: Crispy, skin-on, crinkle cut potatoes, sprinkled with peri peri seasoning and served with our Fry Sauce. (Kcals: 405.6 excluding dip)

info.name: Crispy Paneer Bites
info.description: 8 Crispy Jalapeno Paneer nuggets, lightly sprinkled with your choice of seasoning, served with our Chipotle Mayo Dip.  (Kcals: 394 excluding dip)

info.name: Cheesy Dirty Fries
info.description: Our signature crispy golden fries, served with gooey cheese sauce, tangy gherkins and jalapenos. 505.69 Kcals

info.name: Atomic Chicken Dirty Fries
info.description: Our signature crispy golden fries, served with gooey cheese sauce, tangy gherkins and Atomic tender chunks. 576 Kcals

info.name: Chicken Tenders
info.description: 5 Southern Fried Pieces of Chicken Supremes deep fried till golden and crispy served with Chipotle Mayo Dip.  (Kcals: 721.7 excluding dip)

info.name: Atomic Tenders
info.description: 5 Chicken Supremes marinated overnight in our super-secret spice rub and served with a delicious Honey Mustard Dip.  (Kcals: 721.1 excluding dip)

info.name: Cajun Tenders
info.description: 5 Chicken supremes deep fried until golden and coated in Cajun spice. Served with Chipotle Mayo Dip.  (Kcals: 799.18 excluding dip)

info.name: Smoky Bbq Wings
info.description: 8 Crispy Fried Chicken Wings tossed in our inhouse Sweet, Smoky and Spicy BBQ sauce. (Kcals: 1122 excluding dip)

info.name: Very Peri Hot Wings
info.description: 8 Very Crispy, Very Juicy pieces of Chicken Wings coated with our very spicy Peri - Peri Seasoning and served with our homemade Hot Sauce. (Kcals: 1143 excluding dip)

info.name: Chicken Nuggets
info.description: 8 Juicy, Crispy Chicken Nuggets sprinkled lightly with our Cajun Seasoning served with our Chipotle Mayo Dip. (Kcals: 340 excluding dip)

info.name: Chicken Popcorn
info.description: Bite-sized pieces of juicy chicken, coated in a crispy seasoned batter, perfect for snacking or sharing. Kcals: 275

info.name: Chicken Popcorn & Fries Bucket
info.description: A complete sharing bucket with crispy chicken popcorn, classic fries and spicy peri peri fries, paired with spicy garlic aioli and creamy jalapeno cheese sauce for the perfect balance of flavours.

info.name: Chicken Popcorn Bucket
info.description: Crispy and juicy chicken popcorn served in a generous bucket served with spicy garlic aioli and creamy jalapeno cheese sauce. Perfect for sharing.

info.name: Clucket Bucket
info.description: Build Your Own Bucket

info.name: Tenders Clucket Bucket
info.description: All our Tenders in a Bucket! 6 pc Atomic, 3 pc Cajun, 3 pc Chicken Tenders and 4 Dips.

info.name: Truffle Mayo
info.description: Mayo-based sauce infused with Truffle Oil and Pepper. Kcals: 228

info.name: Fry Sauce
info.description: Our in-house signature sauce is the perfect accompaniment to all our Sides and Burgers.  Kcals: 188

info.name: Chipotle Mayo
info.description: Flavour-packed Chipotle mayo is the perfect accompaniment to all our Sides and Burgers. Kcals: 195

info.name: Very Peri Hot Sauce
info.description: Very Spicy House Sauce is the perfect accompaniment to all our Sides and Burgers.

info.name: Cheese Sauce (jalapeno)
info.description: Cheesy goodness and jalapeno, our cheese sauce pairs perfectly with all our Sides and Burgers.  Kcals: 102

info.name: Chocochip Brownie
info.description: Rich, fudgy brownie made with pure couverture. 100% eggless. Kcals: 298

info.name: Caramel Churro Bites
info.description: Golden, crispy churros with a soft centre, tossed in cinnamon sugar and served with a rich caramel dipping sauce. 322Kcals

info.name: Chocolate Churro Bites
info.description: Golden, crispy churros with a soft centre, tossed in cinnamon sugar and served with a dark chocolate dipping sauce

info.name: Tiramisu Thiccshake
info.description: A creamy blend of espresso and cocoa

info.name: Classic Strawberry Thicc Shake

info.name: Salted Caramel Thicc Shake
info.description: This sweet, salted, thick, and bold shake will win your hearts with the very first sip. Serving size/Kcal- 250ml/424Kcal
